tasks.label: Device Matrix: Core
tasks.command: $cfgPath = '.\LastLapMaxHRZone\.vscode\ciq.local.json'; if (-not (Test-Path $cfgPath)) { Write-Error 'Missing LastLapMaxHRZone/.vscode/ciq.local.json. Run task: Configure CIQ SDK + Key (once) in LastLapMaxHRZone'; exit 1 }; $cfg = Get-Content $cfgPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $sdk = $cfg.sdkHome; $key = $cfg.devKey; if (-not (Test-Path "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat")) { Write-Error "monkeyc.bat not found under $sdk\bin"; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path $key)) { Write-Error "Developer key not found: $key"; exit 1 }; & ".\scripts\Test-ConnectIQDeviceMatrix.ps1" -ProjectPath ".\LastLapMaxHRZone" -MonkeyCPath "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat" -DeveloperKeyPath $key -Mode Core

tasks.label: Device Matrix: Manifest
tasks.command: $cfgPath = '.\LastLapMaxHRZone\.vscode\ciq.local.json'; if (-not (Test-Path $cfgPath)) { Write-Error 'Missing LastLapMaxHRZone/.vscode/ciq.local.json. Run task: Configure CIQ SDK + Key (once) in LastLapMaxHRZone'; exit 1 }; $cfg = Get-Content $cfgPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $sdk = $cfg.sdkHome; $key = $cfg.devKey; if (-not (Test-Path "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat")) { Write-Error "monkeyc.bat not found under $sdk\bin"; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path $key)) { Write-Error "Developer key not found: $key"; exit 1 }; & ".\scripts\Test-ConnectIQDeviceMatrix.ps1" -ProjectPath ".\LastLapMaxHRZone" -MonkeyCPath "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat" -DeveloperKeyPath $key -Mode Manifest

tasks.label: Device Matrix: Both
tasks.command: $cfgPath = '.\LastLapMaxHRZone\.vscode\ciq.local.json'; if (-not (Test-Path $cfgPath)) { Write-Error 'Missing LastLapMaxHRZone/.vscode/ciq.local.json. Run task: Configure CIQ SDK + Key (once) in LastLapMaxHRZone'; exit 1 }; $cfg = Get-Content $cfgPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $sdk = $cfg.sdkHome; $key = $cfg.devKey; if (-not (Test-Path "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat")) { Write-Error "monkeyc.bat not found under $sdk\bin"; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path $key)) { Write-Error "Developer key not found: $key"; exit 1 }; & ".\scripts\Test-ConnectIQDeviceMatrix.ps1" -ProjectPath ".\LastLapMaxHRZone" -MonkeyCPath "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat" -DeveloperKeyPath $key -Mode Both

tasks.label: Launch Simulator (Chosen Device)
tasks.command: $device = '${input:simDeviceId}'; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($device)) { Write-Error 'Device id is required'; exit 1 }; $cfgPath = '.\LastLapMaxHRZone\.vscode\ciq.local.json'; if (-not (Test-Path $cfgPath)) { Write-Error 'Missing LastLapMaxHRZone/.vscode/ciq.local.json. Run task: Configure CIQ SDK + Key (once) in LastLapMaxHRZone'; exit 1 }; $cfg = Get-Content $cfgPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $sdk = $cfg.sdkHome; $key = $cfg.devKey; if (-not (Test-Path "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat")) { Write-Error "monkeyc.bat not found under $sdk\bin"; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path "$sdk\bin\monkeydo.bat")) { Write-Error "monkeydo.bat not found under $sdk\bin"; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path "$sdk\bin\simulator.exe")) { Write-Error "simulator.exe not found under $sdk\bin"; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path $key)) { Write-Error "Developer key not found: $key"; exit 1 }; Push-Location .\LastLapMaxHRZone; try { & "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat" -f monkey.jungle -o ".\bin\sim-$device.prg" -d $device -w -y $key; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; if (-not (Get-Process -Name simulator -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process -FilePath "$sdk\bin\simulator.exe"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4 }; & "$sdk\bin\monkeydo.bat" ".\bin\sim-$device.prg" $device; exit $LASTEXITCODE } finally { Pop-Location }

tasks.label: Export IQ Package
tasks.command: $cfgPath = '.\LastLapMaxHRZone\.vscode\ciq.local.json'; if (-not (Test-Path $cfgPath)) { Write-Error 'Missing LastLapMaxHRZone/.vscode/ciq.local.json. Run task: Configure CIQ SDK + Key (once) in LastLapMaxHRZone'; exit 1 }; $cfg = Get-Content $cfgPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $sdk = $cfg.sdkHome; $key = $cfg.devKey; if (-not (Test-Path "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat")) { Write-Error "monkeyc.bat not found under $sdk\bin"; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path $key)) { Write-Error "Developer key not found: $key"; exit 1 }; Push-Location .\LastLapMaxHRZone; try { & "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat" -f monkey.jungle -o ".\bin\LastLapMaxHRZone.iq" -y $key -e -r; exit $LASTEXITCODE } finally { Pop-Location }

inputs.description: Connect IQ device id to simulate (example: fr55, fr265, edge130)
